title: make: *** No rule to make target '/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp', needed by 'verilated.o'.  Stop.
body:
OS & distribution : WSL2, Ubuntu 22.04, 5.15.146.1-microsoft-standard-WSL2
Verilator version: Verilator 5.024 2024-04-05 rev v5.024-42-gc561fe8ba
GCC Verison: gcc (Ubuntu 11.4.0-1ubuntu1~22.04) 11.4.0

I had some issues with installing and getting verilator running. I finally decided to go with running from git repo.

What I did:
```
git clone https://github.com/verilator/verilator.git
cd verilator
make
export VERILATOR_ROOT=/home/aba/verilator
```

The command I use:
```
$VERILATOR_ROOT/bin/verilator --binary -j 0 -O3 --trace --relative-includes --top dnn_engine_tb -I../ -F ../sources.txt -CFLAGS -I../ /mnt/d/dnn-engine/deepsocflow/c/sim.c --Mdir ./
```
The error I get:
```
make: Entering directory '/mnt/d/dnn-engine/run/work/build'
make: *** No rule to make target '/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp', needed by 'verilated.o'.  Stop.
make: Leaving directory '/mnt/d/dnn-engine/run/work/build'
%Error: make -C ./ -f Vdnn_engine_tb.mk -j 20 exited with 2
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /home/aba/verilator/bin/verilator_bin --binary -j 0 -O3 --trace --relative-includes --top dnn_engine_tb -I../ -F ../sources.txt -CFLAGS -I../ /mnt/d/dnn-engine/deepsocflow/c/sim.c --Mdir ./
```

Is this an incompatibility with GCC version?
code_blocks:
make: Entering directory '/mnt/d/dnn-engine/run/work/build'
make: *** No rule to make target '/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp', needed by 'verilated.o'.  Stop.
make: Leaving directory '/mnt/d/dnn-engine/run/work/build'
%Error: make -C ./ -f Vdnn_engine_tb.mk -j 20 exited with 2
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /home/aba/verilator/bin/verilator_bin --binary -j 0 -O3 --trace --relative-includes --top dnn_engine_tb -I../ -F ../sources.txt -CFLAGS -I../ /mnt/d/dnn-engine/deepsocflow/c/sim.c --Mdir ./
